en: Please, Ross, it was so obvious. It was like you were marking your territory.
ko: 더 이상 사무실에서 네 영역을 표시하듯이.

en: I mean, you might as well have just come in and peed all around my desk.
ko: 그냥 들어와서 내 책상 주위에 소변이나 쌌으면 좋았을 텐데.

en: I know what's going on here, okay? Mark explained it all to me. He said this is what you guys do.
ko: 여기서 무슨 일이 일어나고 있는지 알아, 알겠지?

en: Yeah, well, if Mark said that, then Mark's an idiot.
Mark's a genius. Why? How? How is he a genius?
Look, don't you see what's happening here? Instead of hitting on her right away, he's becoming her confidant.
ko: 여기서 무슨 일이 일어나고 있는지 모르겠어? 바로 작업을 거는 대신,

en: Now he's gonna be the guy that she goes to to complain about you.
ko: 이제 그녀는 너에 대해 불평할 사람으로 그를 찾을 거야.

en: What am I gonna do? Well, why don't you send her a musical bug?
ko: 그녀에게 뮤지컬 벌레를 보내는 건 어때?

en: Oh, no, you already did that.
Alright, look, you're gonna have to go there yourself now, okay? Make a few surprise visits.
I don't know you guys. Alright, fine. Don't do anything. Just sit here and talk to us.
ko: 자, 좋아, 아무것도 하지 말고 여기 앉아서 이야기해.

en: Meanwhile, she is talking to him about you.
ko: 그냥 여기 앉아서 우리랑 이야기해. 그동안 그녀는 이야기하고 있어

en: And he's being Mr. Joe sensitive. And she starts thinking maybe this is the guy for me because he understands me.
ko: 그동안 그녀는 너에 대해 그와 이야기하고 있고 그는 아주 감성적이야.
